---
id: allow-kiosk-registration
title: "Open a 30-second kiosk registration window"
description: "Allows a new kiosk device to register itself within the next 30 seconds."

  method={"post"}
  path={"/kiosk/api/allowRegistration"}

Allows a new kiosk device to register itself within the next 30 seconds.
